## Meeting Purpose

[Interview between Matthew Panzarino (growthx.ai) and Maricela Garcia for an Executive Assistant role.](https://fathom.video/share/u3W--W4n1VzPdY42zjhsy_GX3uF8yZGU?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Maricela has 15+ years of experience as a remote executive assistant, with long-term roles in real estate and insurance industries](https://fathom.video/share/u3W--W4n1VzPdY42zjhsy_GX3uF8yZGU?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [growthx.ai is a content-focused, AI-driven growth agency with \~50 clients and a strong emphasis on automation and AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/u3W--W4n1VzPdY42zjhsy_GX3uF8yZGU?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [The EA role will involve managing Matthew's packed calendar, preparing him for meetings, and helping to delegate low-leverage work](https://fathom.video/share/u3W--W4n1VzPdY42zjhsy_GX3uF8yZGU?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [Both parties acknowledge this will be a learning experience in defining the EA role and working relationship](https://fathom.video/share/u3W--W4n1VzPdY42zjhsy_GX3uF8yZGU?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)

## Topics

### Matthew's Background and Current Role

  - [10 years at TechCrunch in editorial leadership and event management](https://fathom.video/share/u3W--W4n1VzPdY42zjhsy_GX3uF8yZGU?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Current role at growthx.ai combines content expertise with product development](https://fathom.video/share/u3W--W4n1VzPdY42zjhsy_GX3uF8yZGU?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Focuses on high-touch client interactions, relationship management, and hiring](https://fathom.video/share/u3W--W4n1VzPdY42zjhsy_GX3uF8yZGU?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)

### Maricela's Experience

  - [8 years at a real estate company in Orlando (2010-2018)](https://fathom.video/share/u3W--W4n1VzPdY42zjhsy_GX3uF8yZGU?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
      - [Progressed from inside sales to transaction coordinator](https://fathom.video/share/u3W--W4n1VzPdY42zjhsy_GX3uF8yZGU?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
      - [Handled admin tasks, email, scheduling, vendor management, and basic graphic design](https://fathom.video/share/u3W--W4n1VzPdY42zjhsy_GX3uF8yZGU?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [7 years at an independent insurance agency in Orlando (2018-2025)](https://fathom.video/share/u3W--W4n1VzPdY42zjhsy_GX3uF8yZGU?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
      - [Started with general admin duties, evolved to working directly with CEO](https://fathom.video/share/u3W--W4n1VzPdY42zjhsy_GX3uF8yZGU?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
      - [Managed email, calendar, and event planning for executives](https://fathom.video/share/u3W--W4n1VzPdY42zjhsy_GX3uF8yZGU?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)

### growthx.ai's Structure and Operations

  - [Uses tools like Slack, Gmail, Notion, Linear (ticketing), and Adio (CRM)](https://fathom.video/share/u3W--W4n1VzPdY42zjhsy_GX3uF8yZGU?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
  - [Content delivery structure:](https://fathom.video/share/u3W--W4n1VzPdY42zjhsy_GX3uF8yZGU?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
      - [Directors manage \~12 clients each](https://fathom.video/share/u3W--W4n1VzPdY42zjhsy_GX3uF8yZGU?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)
      - [Managing editors handle 2-4 clients each](https://fathom.video/share/u3W--W4n1VzPdY42zjhsy_GX3uF8yZGU?tab=summary&timestamp=1175.0)
      - [Content managers create content using AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/u3W--W4n1VzPdY42zjhsy_GX3uF8yZGU?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [12-week onboarding process for new clients](https://fathom.video/share/u3W--W4n1VzPdY42zjhsy_GX3uF8yZGU?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
  - [\~45-50 current clients with weekly content meetings](https://fathom.video/share/u3W--W4n1VzPdY42zjhsy_GX3uF8yZGU?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)

### AI and Automation Focus

  - [Strong emphasis on using AI tools for content creation and workflow optimization](https://fathom.video/share/u3W--W4n1VzPdY42zjhsy_GX3uF8yZGU?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Expectation for EA to embrace and utilize automation tools](https://fathom.video/share/u3W--W4n1VzPdY42zjhsy_GX3uF8yZGU?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [Matthew views AI as augmenting human work, not replacing it](https://fathom.video/share/u3W--W4n1VzPdY42zjhsy_GX3uF8yZGU?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)

### Potential EA Responsibilities

  - [Calendar management and meeting preparation](https://fathom.video/share/u3W--W4n1VzPdY42zjhsy_GX3uF8yZGU?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [Delegating low-leverage, repetitive tasks from Matthew](https://fathom.video/share/u3W--W4n1VzPdY42zjhsy_GX3uF8yZGU?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
  - [Managing communication layers and "access management"](https://fathom.video/share/u3W--W4n1VzPdY42zjhsy_GX3uF8yZGU?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Assisting with hiring processes and candidate research](https://fathom.video/share/u3W--W4n1VzPdY42zjhsy_GX3uF8yZGU?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [Adapting to evolving needs as the working relationship develops](https://fathom.video/share/u3W--W4n1VzPdY42zjhsy_GX3uF8yZGU?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)

### Content Industry Insights

  - [Discussion on the importance of understanding content quality as a consumer](https://fathom.video/share/u3W--W4n1VzPdY42zjhsy_GX3uF8yZGU?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)
  - [Emphasis on creating "sticky," valuable content for clients](https://fathom.video/share/u3W--W4n1VzPdY42zjhsy_GX3uF8yZGU?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Matthew to consider any additional questions and reach out if needed](https://fathom.video/share/u3W--W4n1VzPdY42zjhsy_GX3uF8yZGU?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)
  - [Potential follow-up on Maricela's experience with content organizations](https://fathom.video/share/u3W--W4n1VzPdY42zjhsy_GX3uF8yZGU?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
  - [Further discussions on role definition and expectations as needed](https://fathom.video/share/u3W--W4n1VzPdY42zjhsy_GX3uF8yZGU?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
